fragmentation method: followed by collision-induced dissociation tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS)
instrument: using an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with an Advion nanomate ESI source
reduction reagent: made of 60 mM DTT, 2% SDS, and 40 mM Tris–HCl
reduction concentration: made of 60 mM DTT, 2% SDS, and 40 mM Tris–HCl
